mapper.select: SELECT * FROM article WHERE slug = #{slug} AND published = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, title_zh, title_es, slug, excerpt, excerpt_zh, excerpt_es, content, content_zh, content_es, cover_image, category, author, published, published_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{titleZh}, #{titleEs}, #{slug}, #{excerpt}, #{excerptZh}, #{excerptEs}, #{content}, #{contentZh}, #{contentEs}, #{coverImage}, #{category}, #{author}, #{published}, #{publishedAt})
